message:
perf(lexical/cass-compat): split prefix field into direct pre-tokenized terms using cass_prefix_terms analyzer

The prefix fields (title_prefix, content_prefix) were previously
indexed with the same `hyphen_normalize` analyzer the full-text fields
use: a `CassTokenizer` + HyphenDecompose + CjkBigramDecompose +
LowerCaser + RemoveLongFilter pipeline. That was defensive —
`cass_generate_edge_ngrams` already emits normalized, space-separated
prefix terms, so running them through the full pipeline re-tokenized
and re-filtered already-finished terms at index time, inflating the
writer cost.

Introduce a second, dedicated analyzer and a pre-tokenized builder.

- New `cass_build_prefix_terms_analyzer()` registers the
  `cass_prefix_terms` tokenizer on the index:
    `WhitespaceTokenizer + LowerCaser`
  which splits on whitespace (our `cass_push_prefix_term` always
  pushes a leading space between terms) and lowercases — nothing else.
- `cass_ensure_tokenizer(index)` now registers both analyzers:
  `hyphen_normalize` for full-text fields, `cass_prefix_terms` for
  prefix fields.
- `cass_build_schema()` points `prefix_text` at the new tokenizer.
- New `cass_generate_indexable_prefix_terms(text)` (and the shared
  `cass_emit_indexable_prefix_terms(word, indices, cjk_only, out)`
  helper) emit the same set of prefix strings the full-text path
  would have yielded, but already in the canonical "whitespace-joined,
  lowercase-ready" shape the new prefix tokenizer expects. Both
  `build_cass_tantivy_document{,_ref}` route `title_prefix` through
  this builder.
- Bump `CASS_SCHEMA_HASH` from
  `tantivy-schema-v7-hyphen-cjk-bigrams-prefix-freqs-preview-stored`
  to
  `tantivy-schema-v7-hyphen-cjk-bigrams-prefix-freqs-preview-stored-prefix-direct`
  so downstream consumers rebuild rather than using a stale prefix
  index.

`cass_generate_edge_ngrams` is retained for now for the query-side
path; the builder split was intentionally limited to the index-side
prefix field so the change is surface-isolated.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
